description: Headquarters requirement changes, fame adjustments, War Gloves buffs, and multiple combat and system updates.

sections.heading: Headquarters Hideout Requirements Updated
items: Top 600 Season rank requirement removed
Headquarters can be declared immediately after reaching required Season Points
Season Points can come from current or previous season
sections.searchable_text: headquarters hideout requirements season points rank removed

sections.heading: Energy Surge Season Winner Statues Placed
items: First Place: The Lonely Men (Redtree Enclave)
Second Place: Hadoop (Drybasin Oasis)
Third Place: Be Careful (Sunstrand Quicksands)
sections.searchable_text: energy surge season statues lonely men hadoop be careful

sections.heading: New Guild Invite Spam Protections
items: Guild-wide cooldown applied after too many declined invites
Limit on simultaneous invitations
Improved feedback on invite rejection or ignore
sections.searchable_text: guild invite spam cooldown limit feedback

sections.heading: Fame Conversion Adjustments
items: PvE Fame to Faction Points conversion reduced by ~15%
Faction-flagged players still earn ~40% more Faction Points than pre-update
Reputation gain reduced by 30%
sections.searchable_text: fame conversion faction points reputation reduction

sections.heading: Other Changes
items: Energy Surge statue furniture now placeable
Corrupted Dungeon entry now has 10s cooldown instead of global cooldown
Static Dungeon map now shows mob types and tiers
Daily bonus now gives Adept's Tome of Insight (10k Fame)
Treasure chest open time increased from 3s to 5s
Picking Power Core or Energy Crystal removes invulnerability
Furniture can no longer block Power Cores or Energy Crystals
Hideout Power Levels visible in Guild Estates UI
sections.searchable_text: quality of life corrupted dungeon cooldown chest open time power core changes

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes
sections.searchable_text: combat balance axes daggers maces war gloves

subsections.heading: Daggers
subsections.searchable_text: demonfang blood ritual self damage reduced

subsections.heading: Maces
subsections.searchable_text: one handed mace deep leap nerf

subsections.heading: Miscellaneous
subsections.searchable_text: hideout channel time increase anti escape

changes.raw_text: Channel time increased if not home

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Mobile chat and UI fixes
Marketplace search improved
Map overlay reset issue fixed
Guild rankings display fixed
Dungeon minimap icons corrected
Multiple item, ability, and tooltip fixes
AoE escalation fixed for several abilities
Various graphical and UI fixes
sections.searchable_text: bug fixes mobile ui map guild dungeon abilities fixes
